mapper.select: SELECT A.ADM_ID AS id , A.USER_NM AS userNm , A.EML AS eml , A.MTELNO AS mtelno , A.GNDR_SE AS gndrSe , A.TELNO AS telno , A.ADDR AS addr , A.DADDR AS daddr , A.DEPT_CD AS deptCd , A.ORG_CD AS orgCd , A.CI AS ci , A.DI AS di , 'ROLE_ADMIN' AS userSe FROM CMS_ADMIN_USER A WHERE A.ADM_ID = #{admId}
SELECT PWD FROM CMS_PASSWORD WHERE USER_ID = #{admId} AND USER_SE = 'A' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT TK_ID AS tkId , USER_ID AS userId , TK AS tk , EXP_DT AS expDt , RVK_YN AS rkvYn FROM CMS_REFRESH_TOKEN WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND RVK_YN = 'N'
